description_long: This is a weathered wooden storage box with a rugged, distressed appearance, featuring visible wood grain and signs of age. One side is marked with a large, yellow and black warning sign indicating explosive contents, while another side displays a splatter of red, possibly simulating blood or paint, adding a sense of danger or hazardous material. The top of the box has a bold, orange and black symbol, possibly a logo or further warning, set into a recessed panel. The box is reinforced with thick wooden planks and dark metal fasteners, giving it a sturdy, industrial look. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, suggesting the lid may be removable or simply set in place. The overall design suggests it is intended for secure storage of dangerous or sensitive materials in an urban or industrial environment.
description: A rugged, weathered wooden storage box with warning signage and a distressed finish, suggesting hazardous contents. Features bold warning symbols, splattered markings, and reinforced construction.
description_view_0: Front view shows a weathered wooden panel with a red splatter mark and several dark fasteners, giving a hazardous and distressed appearance.
description_view_1: This side displays plain, aged wood planks with no signage or markings, highlighting the box's worn texture.
description_view_2: Features a prominent yellow and black explosive warning sign on the wooden panel, emphasizing the box's hazardous contents.
description_view_3: Shows a plain wooden side with visible fasteners but no signage or splatter, focusing on the box's construction details.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: explosive warning sign, splatter marking, top logo panel
